contract_meta.rationale: Phase 21 established the need for a six-node StateGraph but remains in-progress with a single-node wrapper. This batch decomposes the remaining work into 30–45 minute wins to deliver clarify → plan → generate → test → (repair loop) → deliver with per-node telemetry and parity tests.

project.name: UMCA Executor MVP
project.goal: Deliver the six-node LangGraph orchestration behind AGENTS_RUNTIME=langgraph with bounded repair loop, node-level telemetry, and parity tests without breaking existing API behaviors.
project.scope: src/orchestrator/graph.ts and related modules; tests under tests/orchestrator/*
out_of_scope: Service extraction to dedicated orchestrator microservice

execution_model.verification_strategy: Write minimal node-unit tests and run existing integration tests for API parity.
execution_model.description: Each node is implemented as an isolated win with tests; edges wired once nodes exist.
execution_model.failure_mode: HALT on failing lint/type/tests; document in evidence and request guidance.

observability.description: Capture node transitions and execution evidence in JSONL trace.

gates.name: Six-Node Orchestration Implemented
acceptance: Clarify, plan, generate, test, repair, deliver nodes exist
Bounded conditional loop from test → repair → test

tasks.title: Node integration mapping
tasks.description: Identify exact insert points in src/orchestrator/graph.ts for six nodes and list adapter call sites (clarification, planning, generation, testing, repair, deliver).
actions: Record line numbers and functions in .automation/phase22_discovery.json
Confirm feature flag routing and store updates
success_criteria: Discovery file exists with precise line refs

tasks.title: Clarify node
tasks.description: Implement clarify node calling clarification module; returns { clarifications } or no-op.

tasks.title: Plan node
tasks.description: Implement plan node consuming clarifications and returning plan items.

tasks.title: Generate node
tasks.description: Implement generate node invoking generation pipeline/tooling.
success_criteria: generate node returns output for downstream test

tasks.title: Test node
tasks.description: Implement test node executing sandbox tests and producing pass/fail state.
success_criteria: test node produces deterministic result state

tasks.title: Repair node + bounded loop
tasks.description: Implement repair node invoking multiTurnRepair with a bounded loop back to test.
success_criteria: loop capped by counter and result state

tasks.title: Deliver node
tasks.description: Implement deliver node that writes final output/logs to executions store and completes.
success_criteria: executions store shows completed with output

tasks.title: Wire edges and routing
tasks.description: Connect clarify → plan → generate → test → (deliver | repair loop) → deliver, preserving feature flag behavior.

tasks.title: Per-node telemetry
tasks.description: Emit langgraph.node_* events on node enter/exit/fail with execution metadata.

tasks.title: Parity tests + docs alignment
tasks.description: Migrate/expand parity tests to cover graph nodes and update docs to reflect gateway/provider ownership and graph path.

fallback_policies.runtime: Unset AGENTS_RUNTIME or set to stepqueue to fallback

ai_executor_guidelines.test_driven: Add minimal node tests before wiring edges
